content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.76%, Pharma +2.51%, Realty +2.15%, IT +1.95% leading. VIX dropping 5%+ indicates risk-on. Book is 60% deployed with multiple positions in profit territory; focus shifts to position management and locking gains rather than aggressive new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.20,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.6% — SL already at 1029 (above entry 984), locking in solid gains. Current SL is appropriate trail given today's pullback from 1060 high; no further tightening needed as it would risk premature exit on noise. HOLD-equivalent — keeping existing parameters."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4% near 52w high. SL already at breakeven+0.50 — current trail is reasonable. Keeping SL tight given stock is extended (CMP 410 vs 52w high 414); upside to 425 intact on power demand thesis. No change needed — emit HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 1200,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.8% with PSU bank sector lagging today (+0.34% vs broader rally). Stock failed to participate in market strength after running from 64 to 80 — momentum fading. Rs 7,500cr capital raise overhang. Better to redeploy capital. Cut loss before SL of 76.50 hits."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slight loss -0.4%; gold acts as portfolio hedge. FOMC/ECB Apr 29-30 are key catalysts. SL at 119 (~5% below entry) appropriate for hedge position. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%. Current SL at 1418 already at breakeven+slight buffer. CMP 1426 just above SL — keeping tight given stock at 52w high and P/E ~78 stretched. No change to existing parameters."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2% with binary Q4 earnings on Apr 30 (3 days away). SL at 2295 (~3.2% below entry). Sentiment now bullish from supplementary research with delivery accumulation +47%. Holding into earnings is acceptable risk; SL caps downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5% but stock at fresh 52w high after 6% rally today. SL at 1760 (~2.8% below entry) appropriate for momentum name. Earnings May 13. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position flat -0.1% on Organon acquisition day +7%. SL at 1685 (~2.8% below entry). Major catalyst playing out; thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.2% near 52w high. Tightening SL from 312 to 315 (still below entry 320.50, so won't trigger ~1.7% adverse move). Lower-risk transmission play with strong Apr 1 Tumkur-II project win. Q4 May 18."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing pending BUY @ 443 from earlier — leave as is. CMP 453 has run away above limit. Power cluster already represented via NTPC, TORNTPOWER, POWERGRID. No new entry needed; pending order will likely not fill at 443."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing pending BUY @ 612 from earlier — CMP 621 above limit, may not fill. Strong Q4 with +68% PAT and dividend record date Apr 30. Letting pending order work; not stacking a duplicate."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY @ 23.65 already working. Pharma sector strong today; let order work or expire. No duplicate."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround positive but SFIO/SEBI investigation overhang severe. Bearish supplementary sentiment (-0.12). Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AXISBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Earnings disappointment with Rs 2,001cr extra provisions, profit -0.6% YoY. Catching falling knife unwise. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "M&MFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 but stock already +8.4% gap; analyst commentary flags 'underlying concerns'. Book is 60% deployed; not high-enough conviction to add chase entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.20,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ED raid Apr 24 under PMLA. Stock crashed 11.8%. Today's bounce is dead-cat. Hard pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Cutting underperforming PSU bank position; sector lagging broad rally."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.20,
      "reasoning": "+6.6% gain locked with SL above entry. Realty tailwind continues."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; FOMC Apr 29-30 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+; stock at 52w high with stretched P/E."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2295.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 earnings Apr 30; delivery accumulation supportive. SL caps downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; stock near 52w high. Let it run with tight stop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1760.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high; momentum intact. SL ~2.8% below entry appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1685.00,
      "reasoning": "Organon acquisition catalyst playing out today; thesis fresh."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 312 to 315 as stock holds near 52w high."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HINDZINC and PHARMABEES pending orders working — monitor for fill. M&MFIN and SUNPHARMA momentum worth tracking for pullback entries. ANANTRAJ avoided due to ED probe; INDUSINDBK avoided due to SFIO investigation overhang.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 60% deployed with 9 positions; net unrealized +Rs 3,288. Power cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID) is present — combined ~14% of capital, manageable. Exiting MAHABANK frees ~Rs 95K cash and removes the worst-performing name. After exit, deployment drops to ~50% — adequate buffer for selective adds if pending HINDZINC/TATAPOWER fills. Three pending orders are correctly working; not stacking duplicates. Performance context (3W/2L, 11% win rate but PF 2.2x) shows discipline working — letting winners run and cutting losers."
}
